title: Sooravalida Song Lyrics Maruthu
stanzas:
Sooravalida Song Lyrics Maruthu
#DImman #JineshPrabhu

sooraavalida
naanga thottaale seerum pulida
yeri adida
ooru onnaaga vaettu vedidaa (2)

puzhudhi odamboda aadumada kaalu
ezhudhi maalaathu enga varalaaru

vaal eduthu vagidueduthu
seevum seemada
enga thekku thisaikaaranukku
pullum vaaluda

nimindhu ninna karudhu
nermaiyinna marudhu (2)

sooraavalida
naanga thottaale seerum pulida
yeri adida
ooru onnaaga vaettu vedidaa (2)

kaattu panamaramaa
karuppaa odambirukkum
aanaalum enga manam vella vella

mootta mudhukilathaan
nethamum somandhiduvom
aanaalum baaram enga nenjil illa

kaaichi pona enga
kaiyilathaan regai illa
aanaalum kavala illa

naanga nethiyila
poosugira manna vida
thiruneeru usanthathilla

thalaimela ganathathaan
yethi vaippom
aana thalaikkulla
ganathathaan yaetha maattom

nimindhu ninna karudhu
nermaiyinna marudhu (2)

sooraavalida
naanga thottaale seerum pulida
yeri adida
ooru onnaaga vaettu vedidaa

jalli kattu kaala
ithu thaakkumadi aala
vetti vambu senja
ivan katta vaippaan sela

mathaappo poo pola
pongi sirippaane
kithaappu kaattaama
kotti koduppaane

nananja pana pola valathithaan
nalla manasu mala pola osathithaan

sattaiyila azhukkkirukkum
savadaalu neranjirukkum
aanaalum naanga romba gethu gethu

vervai velichahtula
irutta thorathiduvom
maaraatha anbu enga sothu sothu

summa sandithanam panni
varum salli paiyan
kuthikaalu narambeduppom

ooru ponnugala
kevalama sonnavana
boli pottu vaginthiduvom

aathaaram ammanu aasa vaippom
ava kaappaathum
saaminnu poosa vaippom

nimindhu ninna karudhu
nermaiyinna marudhu (4)
sooraavalidaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sooravalida?

The song Sooravalida celebrates the joy of life and the exuberance of youth, encouraging listeners to embrace their vibrant spirit.

What is the plot context of Maruthu related to this song?

The song plays during a lively sequence in Maruthu, highlighting the protagonist's energetic personality and zest for life.

Who is the singer and music director of Sooravalida?

The song is sung by Jinesh Prabhu and composed by D Imman.

When was Sooravalida released?

The song was released on May 20, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sooravalida, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the essence of celebration and joy. Featured in the film Maruthu, it showcases the protagonist's lively spirit and zest for life. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and motivation, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. With Jinesh Prabhu's dynamic vocals and D Imman's lively composition, the song resonates with audiences, encouraging them to embrace their inner energy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sooravalida from Maruthu is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and energy. With Jinesh Prabhu's dynamic vocals and D Imman's vibrant composition, this track is sure to get you moving. Dive into the infectious beats and let the rhythm take over your senses!
stanzaMeanings: We are the brave ones, we fight for our land, we will protect our home.
Our bodies dance in the mud, our feet write stories of our past.
We take life and give it back, we thrive in our village, even the grass grows for our strength.
Your thoughts about us are pure, Maruthu.
We are the brave ones, we fight for our land, we will protect our home.
The wind blows fiercely, but our hearts remain strong.
Even if the storm comes, we will stand firm, but our hearts are not burdened.
If we lose our grip, we won't have any strength, but we won't worry about it.
We are not afraid of the challenges we face, we will not let them defeat us.
We will rise above the troubles, we will not let them bring us down.
We will take the lead, but we will not change our core values.
Your thoughts about us are pure, Maruthu.
We are the brave ones, we fight for our land, we will protect our home.
The storm may come, but we will face it, and we will not let it break us.
Like a flower blooming, we will shine, we will give without holding back.
Like a good heart, we will grow and flourish.
Even if we are faced with challenges, we will remain strong and united.
In the light of the dawn, we will shine, our love will be our strength.
We will not let the troubles come to us, we will rise above them.
We will speak the truth, and we will not let lies defeat us.
We will protect our traditions and values, we will not let them fade away.
Your thoughts about us are pure, Maruthu.
